title: ortholoma serratum
intro: Ortholoma serratum, also known as Serraria serrata or Serrulatia serrata, is a plant species belonging to the Legume family, characterized by its distinctive serrated leaves. Traditionally, Ortholoma serratum has been used in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to combat fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ortholoma serratum are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, while its herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used to address various health conditions. However, further research is required to confirm the efficacy and safety of Ortholoma serratum as a medicinal herb.
